query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name as nome,
  u.status,
  COUNT(c.id) as vendas,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.valorVenda), 0) as vgv
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN contratos c ON u.id = c.corretorId
WHERE u.role = 'corretor'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.status
HAVING COUNT(c.id) > 0
ORDER BY vgv DESC;
